title: Ambient Sample Storage System for Field-Collected Insect Samples
author: Roland Wouters
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bgxnjxme

steps.instruction: Measure the pipette tip against the Eppendorf tube, and cut off the tip of the pipette tip. The remaining length of the pipette tip should fit inside the Eppendorf tube, with the wide end of the tube fitting tightly against the inside of the tube.
With the tip removed from the tube, add approximately 100ul of silica gel to the tube.
Push the tip into the tube through the silica gel. Close the tube.
When collecting samples, place the insect sample into the wide end of the tip, close the tube lid.
